subject: Prof Maya Patel published a new paper on trustworthy ML systems
snippet: Journal publication accepted with collaborators from industry and healthcare.

subject: Dr Omar Hassan received major grant funding for edge AI security
snippet: New grant will support multi-year systems and security research.

subject: Prof Elena Rodriguez delivered a keynote talk at the Midwest Data Systems Symposium
snippet: Keynote talk focused on reliable distributed infrastructure for public-interest applications.

subject: Dr Priya Narayanan received an award for undergraduate teaching innovation
snippet: Teaching award recognizes project-based systems instruction and mentoring.

subject: Prof Daniel Cho organized a workshop event on secure software supply chains
snippet: Workshop event will bring together faculty, alumni, and industry engineers.

subject: Prof Aisha Thompson highlighted student achievement in ACM regional programming
snippet: Mentored student team advanced with a top-five finish and strong systems design work.

subject: Dr Victor Kim shared a department update on community computing outreach
snippet: Update covers civic partnerships and summer engagement plans.

subject: Prof Lydia Chen published a journal article on low-power computer vision
snippet: Publication explores efficient models for mobile sensing and embedded devices.

subject: Dr Samuel Brooks received grant support for accessible HCI tooling
snippet: Grant funding expands collaboration with campus accessibility partners.

subject: Prof Hannah Wu gave an invited seminar talk on formal methods for robotics
snippet: Seminar talk covered verification pipelines and deployment case studies.

subject: Dr Miguel Alvarez was named winner of a translational research award
snippet: Award recognizes collaborative work in medical imaging systems.

subject: Prof Nina Kapoor launched a conference event for AI in public service
snippet: Conference event agenda includes public-sector deployment and evaluation sessions.

subject: Dr Aaron Bell celebrated student achievement in NSF graduate fellowship results
snippet: Mentored student cohort earned multiple fellowship offers this cycle.

subject: Prof Sophia Green published a paper on privacy-preserving analytics
snippet: Paper introduces scalable techniques for secure cohort analysis.

subject: Dr Jason Reed received grant funding for resilient cloud infrastructure education
snippet: Funding supports curriculum, testbeds, and open lab materials.

subject: Prof Leila Farouk gave a distinguished lecture talk on responsible data governance
snippet: Talk highlighted governance models for applied machine learning teams.

subject: Dr Kevin Morales received a college award for faculty mentorship
snippet: Honor recognizes graduate advising and cross-lab mentorship.

subject: Prof Grace Liu hosted a workshop event on data-intensive systems
snippet: Workshop event connected doctoral students with alumni in infrastructure engineering.

subject: Dr Emily Foster shared student achievement from a cybersecurity capstone showcase
snippet: Mentored teams delivered strong prototypes and community-facing demos.

subject: Prof Raj Mehta shared an alumni panel update for the software engineering community
snippet: Update summarizes panel themes around platform engineering and developer productivity.

subject: Dr Irene Novak published a journal publication on scientific computing reproducibility
snippet: Publication describes reproducible workflows for large-scale simulation teams.

subject: Prof Thomas Okafor received grant backing for robotics and agriculture systems
snippet: Grant brings together sensing, autonomy, and field deployment partners.

subject: Dr Julia Bennett delivered a plenary keynote talk on scalable data platforms
snippet: Keynote talk focused on operational reliability and developer experience.

subject: Prof Marcus Silva organized a campus event on computing for climate resilience
snippet: Event connected CS faculty with environmental science and public policy groups.
